title: Forty years in the Office of the President, University of California, 1905-1945 : oral history transcript / and related material, 1959
creator: Stevens, Frank, 1885- ive
Regional Cultural History Project (University of California, Berkeley)
Fry, Amelia R
description: Comments on work in the president's office as stenographer, secretary and executive secretary under presidents Wheeler, Barrows, Campbell and Sproul; faculty members; the campus during the two world wars. Appended: Stevens' farewell address to President Wheeler and official job description. Photographs inserted
Dept. of Special Collections, University of California, Los Angeles
subject: University of California (1868-1952). Office of the President
